sglang.title: Support load fine-tuned LLaVA model
sglang.author: isaac-vidas
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
When loading a fine-tuned LLaVA model, ignore the vision tower keys in the params_dict to workaround the following error:
~$ python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path org/llava_1.5_13b_finetune --tokenizer-path llava-hf/llava-1.5-13b-hf --port 30000
Special tokens have been added in the vocabular

sglang.title: Suppport qwen model and solve some problems
sglang.author: Arcmoon-Hu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
1、Add Qwen Model support based on vllm's qwen model file
2、Solve some problems when loading Qwen model

The chat template is still wrong. Will fix it in a follow-up PR.

vllm.title: Fix "Port could not be cast to integer value as <function get_open_port>"
vllm.author: pcmoritz

vllm.title: Add qwen2
vllm.author: JustinLin610
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Recently, I have pushed the new codes of Qwen2 to Hugging Face Transformers, and thus I also would love to contribute the new model to vLLM as well.
In this PR, I have provided the implementation of Qwen2 model and add some notes on it.

vllm.title: Fix progress bar and allow HTTPS in `benchmark_serving.py`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes the progress bar issue identified in #2172 and also adds a --protocol argument so that you can benchmark HTTPS endpoints.
An alternative solution for the args change is replacing protocol, host, port, endpoint with url. I can make that change in this PR if the reviewer prefers.
cc @simon-mo

vllm.title: Add a 1-line docstring to explain why calling context_attention_fwd twice in test_prefix_prefill.py
vllm.author: JasonZhu1313
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Initially it was confusing to me why we call it twice repeatedly, later found out it was for warming up the triton kernel, just add 1-linear doc string:
Calling it once (warmup):
triton Time: 15.10 ms
xformers Time: 0.61 ms
Calling it twice (after warmup):
triton Time: 1.95 ms
xformers Time: 0.62 ms
